hero.subtitle: Your team's time is your most valuable asset. We make sure none of it goes to waste.

items.title: Your team loses 20h/week on repetitive tasks
items.desc: Quotes, follow-ups, reports, data entry. Hours wasted every week on things technology handles in 5 minutes.

items.title: Your leads are waiting. Your competitors aren't.
items.desc: A lead that waits 4 hours is a lead your competitor already answered. Your response rates are hitting a ceiling.

items.title: Your competitors are automating and you aren't yet
items.desc: While your team does things manually, others have already plugged in the right tools. The gap is widening.

pillars.label: Our expertise
pillars.subtitle: Five areas of expertise, one team. From acquisition to conversion.

items.label: Recovered every month for our clients

method.label: Our method
method.subtitle: 5 clear steps, a proven process.
steps: First conversation
30 free minutes to understand your situation. We'll tell you honestly whether and how we can help.
Audit
Mapping your processes. We identify the tasks that cost the most time for the least expertise.
Report
A concrete action plan with deliverables, timelines and prices. Everything fixed upfront, in writing.
Implementation
We execute. Weekly check-ins, real-time progress access. You stay in control of the project.
Maintenance
Delivery, tool training, and performance monitoring. We stay with you after launch.

items.name: Marc R.
items.quote: We used to spend 30 hours a month on quotes and follow-ups. Now it's 5 hours, and we convert twice as much. Timevo paid for itself in 6 weeks.

items.name: Léa V.
items.quote: The AI agent handles 70% of repetitive questions. My brokers only deal with the genuinely hot files now.

items.name: Antoine D.
items.quote: My reps used to close a quote every three days. Now every call ends with a quote sent within 4 minutes.

members.name: Max
members.bio: 10 years closing deals in real estate, gaming and marketing. Speaks your language before tech.

members.name: Willy
members.bio: 10 years building editorial and SEO systems across multiple markets. Knows n8n inside out.

estimator.label: Simulator
estimator.h2: How many hours are you losing every week?
estimator.subtitle: 5 questions about your business. Instant result, no commitment.

questions.q: How many people are in your team?
How many inbound requests per month? (quotes, leads, proposals)
How many hours a week on repetitive tasks?
Do you have a tool to track clients and prospects?
Average revenue per client? (one-shot or annual)

estimator.result_disclaimer: Estimate based on averages observed with our clients. Exact figures validated during the free audit.

faq.label: FAQ
items: How long does it take to deliver an automation?
2 to 3 weeks after the audit. We commit to the date in writing and we deliver.
Which tools do you work with?
CRM (HubSpot, Pipedrive, Salesforce), email, telephony, accounting. We plug into what you already have — no forced migration.
What if we don't have a CRM?
We set one up as part of the package if needed. Notion, Airtable or a classic CRM depending on your maturity.
Do we keep control of the system?
Yes. The code and workflows belong to you. No dependency. If we part ways, you keep everything.
Do you charge by the hour?
No. Fixed setup fee + maintenance subscription. Clear, predictable, no surprises.
Thonon-les-Bains and Montpellier. We work remotely across France and with French-speaking neighbours.

contact.label: Timevo
contact.subtitle: 30 minutes, it's free. We'll tell you honestly where your time goes — and what we can recover.

n8n · AI Agents · Processes for SMBs.

solutions_index.meta_title: Timevo solutions: automation, AI agents, training, websites, SEO
solutions_index.meta_description: Five areas of expertise to give time back to SMBs: process automation, AI agents, training, website creation, search engine optimisation.
solutions_index.h1: Five areas of expertise. One team.
solutions_index.subtitle: Automation, AI agents, training, website creation and SEO. We cover the whole chain — from acquisition to conversion, from internal process to external visibility.

automatisation.meta_title: Business process automation for SMBs — Timevo
automatisation.meta_description: Business process automation for SMBs: quotes, follow-ups, reports, CRM sync. n8n workflows and AI agents, delivered in 2-3 weeks.

hero.h1: Business process automation. Your repetitive tasks, running quietly.
hero.subtitle: We automate quotes, follow-ups, reporting and the sync between your tools. Your teams gain time every day, with nothing new to learn.

items.title: 20 minutes per quote, 80 quotes a month
items.desc: Your reps spend their evenings writing quotes that could go out 4 minutes after the call ends.

items.title: Forgotten follow-ups, lost deals
items.desc: Without an automatic follow-up system, 30 to 50% of warm leads turn cold — just because no one had time to call back.

items.title: Three tools that don't talk to each other
items.desc: CRM, email, accounting, calendar. Every time info is rekeyed by hand, you lose hours and accumulate errors.

deliverables.label: What we deliver
deliverables.h2: Six workflows ready to plug in.
deliverables.subtitle: Six concrete projects, identified during the audit, deployed in 2 to 3 weeks based on your priorities.

items.title: Automatic quotes
items.desc: The call ends, the summary is written, the quote is pre-filled, the email goes out. 20 min recovered per quote.

items.title: Sales follow-ups
items.desc: Email + SMS over 30 days, in your brand voice. Your rep is only notified when the prospect replies.

items.title: Weekly reports
items.desc: Pipeline, sales, leads to follow up, sales KPIs. In your inbox every Monday at 8am.

items.title: CRM sync
items.desc: Your tools finally talk to each other. Email, telephony, accounting, calendar — everything lands in the right place, automatically.

items.title: Client onboarding
items.desc: From signature: welcome email, access credentials, kick-off meeting and first documents go out automatically.

items.title: Custom n8n workflows
items.desc: Whatever else is repetitive in your business that isn't on the list above. We build it during the audit.

case.label: Representative case
before: 80 quotes/month written by hand in the evening
after: Quote sent within 4 min of the call
case.footnote: Representative case based on ongoing installations. Exact figures are validated during the free audit.

method.label: How it works
steps: Audit
30 minutes to map your processes. We pick the 2 or 3 highest-ROI workflows.
Mapping
We model each workflow on paper before coding. You approve the execution plan, step by step.
Deployment
We code, plug in, test on your real cases. Team training, documentation and maintenance so the system keeps evolving.

pricing.label: The offer
includes: 2 to 3 core automations identified during the audit
Integration with your existing tools (CRM, email, telephony, accounting)
Team training on the delivered system
Maintenance, evolutions and new workflows included
pricing.footnote: Flat fee, no hourly billing. The code belongs to you, no dependency.

faq.label: FAQ
items: 2 to 3 weeks after the audit. We commit to the date in writing.
Do we keep control of the system?
Yes. The code and workflows belong to you. If we part ways, you keep everything, hosting included.
What if we don't have a CRM?
We set one up as part of the package if needed. Notion, Airtable or a classic CRM depending on your maturity.
Do you replace our sales team?
No. We free them from everything that isn't selling so they can spend their time selling.

cta.subtitle: We identify 2 or 3 processes to automate. You walk away with a written diagnosis, whether you work with us or not.
cta.reassurance: 30 minutes · Free · No commitment · Written diagnosis

agents-ia.meta_description: AI agents for SMBs: support chatbots, lead pre-qualification, phone assistants, email triage. Available 24/7, trained on your data.

hero.h1: AI agents for business. Your repetitive questions, handled 24/7.
hero.subtitle: Available day and night, trained on your documents, in your brand voice. The Timevo AI agent absorbs support, qualifies leads, and frees your teams from everything that repeats.

problem.label: The problem
problem.h2: What your teams repeat ten times a day.

items.title: 70% of calls are the same questions
items.desc: Availability, pricing, deadlines, order tracking. Your teams spend their days answering the same 15 questions, over and over.

items.title: Your leads wait. Your competitors answer.
items.desc: After hours, evenings, weekends: a lead lands and no one is there. By the time you call back, they've already signed elsewhere.

items.title: Customer service is expensive and slow
items.desc: Hiring people to handle trivial questions is costly. And it doesn't scale. An AI agent handles 200 requests at once, without fatigue or error.

deliverables.label: What we deliver
deliverables.h2: Five standard agents. Plus custom builds.
deliverables.subtitle: Five agents ready to go, plus the option to build your specific case during the audit. All plugged into your tools and trained on your data.

items.title: Support chatbot
items.desc: On your site or WhatsApp. Answers repetitive questions, handles tracking requests, opens a ticket when it gets complex.

items.title: Lead pre-qualification
items.desc: A lead arrives? The agent qualifies in 60 seconds (budget, timing, need) and notifies the right rep with a clean summary.

items.title: AI phone assistant
items.desc: Takes calls, routes to the right person, takes messages, transcribes voicemails. Never miss a call again.

items.title: Automated email triage
items.desc: Urgent vs not, quote vs support, existing client vs prospect. The agent prioritises and assigns. Your teams only handle what matters.

items.title: Sales assistant agent
items.desc: Prepares meetings, gathers prospect context, drafts call summaries. Your reps walk into meetings already prepared.

items.title: Custom agent
items.desc: A specific case the 5 above don't cover? We build it during the audit, plugged into your tools.

case.label: Representative case
after: 140 calls/day absorbed by the AI agent
Brokers focused on hot deals only
case.footnote: Representative case based on ongoing installations. Exact figures are validated during the free audit.

method.label: How it works
steps: Audit
We identify where an AI agent can lift load from your teams. Request volume, brand voice, existing tools.
Training
We train the agent on your documents, FAQs, processes. Tested on real cases before deployment.
Go live
Progressive rollout, conversation monitoring, continuous tuning. The agent learns alongside you.

faq.label: FAQ
items: Is the agent connected to our data?
Yes. CRM, knowledge base, product catalogue, calendar. The agent replies with your information, not generic knowledge.
The agent is scoped to your business perimeter, with guardrails and an automatic human handoff whenever there's doubt.
European hosting, encrypted data, option to use self-hosted models for sensitive use cases.
What if the agent gets stuck?
Automatic handoff to a human with the full conversation context. No lead ever falls into the void.

cta.h2: 30 minutes to identify your first agent.
cta.subtitle: We look at your request volumes, the recurring questions, and we tell you which of the 4 standard agents is the right place to start.
cta.reassurance: 30 minutes · Free · No commitment · Written diagnosis

formation.meta_title: AI and automation training for businesses — Timevo
formation.meta_description: AI training, n8n automation, content creation, LinkedIn, SEO. 5 modules for teams of 3 to 15. On-site or remote.

hero.h1: AI and automation training for your teams.
hero.subtitle: Five short modules so your teams master AI, automation and online visibility. On-site or remote, for groups of 3 to 15.

problem.label: The problem
problem.h2: What an untrained team really costs.

items.title: Your teams use AI poorly, or not at all
items.desc: ChatGPT by feel, weak prompts, mediocre results. The potential is huge, the actual usage tiny.

items.title: Tools change every month
items.desc: Your last training is 18 months old. Meanwhile, GPT-5 shipped, Claude 4.7 shipped, n8n doubled its integrations. Your teams are stuck in 2024.

items.title: A YouTube video trains no one
items.desc: Learning alone, with no real case, no support, no practice: three days later, nobody uses it anymore.

deliverables.label: What we deliver
deliverables.h2: Five standard modules. Plus custom builds.
deliverables.subtitle: Each module blends short theory with hands-on practice on your real cases. And the option of a fully custom programme for your team.

items.title: AI & prompting
items.desc: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini. Effective prompts, role-based use cases, handling limits. 1 intensive day.

items.title: n8n automation
items.desc: Build your first workflows. Plug in CRM, email, Slack. Automate without coding. 2 practical days.

items.title: Content creation
items.desc: Write faster with AI, generate visuals and videos, structure a weekly production. 1-day workshop.

items.title: LinkedIn for pros
items.desc: Converting profile, engaging content, automated prospecting. Built for reps and founders. 1 day.

items.title: SEO essentials
items.desc: Understand Google, write for the web, basic audits, position tracking. For marketers and founders. 1 day.

items.title: Custom programme
items.desc: A specific need (sales, negotiation, industry tools)? We build the module from your real cases.

case.label: Representative case
case.h2: A sales team of around a dozen people.
case.footnote: Representative case based on ongoing installations. Exact figures are validated during the free audit.

method.label: How it works
steps: Diagnosis
30 min to map current usage, identify priority modules, validate the format.
Programme
Content built around your industry, your real cases, your team's existing tools. Sessions scheduled around your workload.
Delivery
Interactive sessions, exercises on your real data. 30-day post-training support to embed the practice for good.

faq.label: FAQ
items: Not yet Qualiopi. Certification is in progress for 2026. For now, trainings are billed directly, not through French OPCO funding.
On-site only. Programmes calibrated to your industry, tools, cases. That's what makes the difference.
1 to 2 days per module, depending on depth. Groups of 3 to 15 max to stay interactive.
Both. In-person in Thonon, Montpellier, or at your office. Remote on Meet or Teams, with live exercises.

cta.subtitle: We look at your team, your tools, what's blocking, and we propose a programme. No off-the-shelf catalogue.
cta.reassurance: 30 minutes · Free · No commitment · Written diagnosis

sites-web.meta_description: Website creation for SMBs: showcase, landing page, e-commerce, redesign. Clean, performant code that you own. No Wix, no dependency.

hero.h1: Website creation for SMBs. Built to convert, not to decorate.
hero.subtitle: Showcase sites, landing pages, e-commerce, redesigns. Clean, performant code, SEO-ready. You stay the owner of everything.

problem.label: The problem
problem.h2: What your site really costs you.

items.title: An expensive site that doesn't convert
items.desc: You paid €8,000 for a site that looks like a brochure. Pretty, maybe. Inbound leads: zero.

items.title: You're trapped in a tool
items.desc: Wix, Shopify, an agency that charges for every change: impossible to leave without redoing everything. You're the one stuck.

items.title: A redesign that never ends
items.desc: Announced at 6 weeks, delivered at 8 months. Vague specs, endless approvals, content that never arrives.

deliverables.label: What we deliver
deliverables.subtitle: Showcase, landing, multi-page, e-commerce. Clean code, hosting on your account, editable content. You leave whenever you want, you take everything with you.

items.title: Showcase site
items.desc: 5 to 10 pages, custom design, performant. A pro presence that doubles as a business card and an acquisition channel.

items.title: Landing page
items.desc: One page focused on conversion, A/B-test ready, plugged into your CRM. Ideal for paid campaigns or a launch.

items.title: Multi-page site
items.desc: 10+ pages, blog, client area, multiple forms. For businesses with several service lines.

items.title: E-commerce
items.desc: Product catalogue, cart, checkout, inventory. Modern stack (Shopify Hydrogen, Medusa, or Next.js + Stripe depending on need).

items.title: Full redesign
items.desc: Audit of the existing site, redesign plan, migration without losing SEO. To move from a site that drags to a site that serves.

items.title: Migration off Wix
items.desc: We get you out of Wix, Squarespace or Shopify. You take back control of the code and the hosting.

case.label: Representative case
after: Page 1 on Google for 12 local keywords
Free edits, owner of the code
case.footnote: Representative case based on ongoing installations. Exact figures are validated during the free audit.

method.label: How it works
steps: Brief
30 min to understand your business, your audiences, your goals. We come back with a structure, design and timeline proposal.
Build
Design first, then development. Mockups approved before code. Weekly demo to adjust along the way.
Launch
Migration, SEO redirects, training so you can manage content yourself. Optional maintenance.

faq.label: FAQ
items: Showcase: 5 to 10. Multi-page: 10+. E-commerce: depends on catalogue. No rigid pricing grid, we shape it during the brief.
Next.js for performance and SEO, or headless WordPress if you prefer. No Wix, Squarespace, or other closed tools.
On your account (Vercel, Cloudflare, OVH — your choice). You stay the owner. We can manage it for you as an option.
Copy: yes, SEO-optimised. Visuals: either we provide, or we use yours. We figure it out at the brief.

cta.h2: 30 minutes to frame your web project.
cta.subtitle: We look at your current site (or lack thereof), your audiences, your constraints, and propose a clear route.
cta.reassurance: 30 minutes · Free · No commitment · Written diagnosis

seo.meta_description: SEO agency for SMBs: local, technical, content, international SEO. Qualified traffic that converts, not empty volume.

hero.subtitle: Local, technical, content, international SEO. We aim for qualified traffic that converts, not empty volume. Method, not dark magic.

items.title: Invisible on what actually pays
items.desc: Your clients type their queries. You appear nowhere. Your competitors? Page one, for 18 months already.

items.title: You're paying Google Ads to exist
items.desc: Without SEO, every click costs €2 to €8. With proper SEO, the same traffic goes free after a few months. The math is simple.

items.title: Your SEO agency reports from 2020
items.desc: Shady links, thin content, over-optimisation. AI changed everything. Today Google rewards useful content and performance, not old-school SEO.

deliverables.label: What we deliver
deliverables.subtitle: Six expertises, adapted to your market and your current maturity. We prioritise during the audit.

items.title: Local SEO
items.desc: Google Business Profile, citations, reviews, map rankings. For distributors, professional firms, businesses working on specific geographic zones.

items.title: Technical SEO
items.desc: Performance, indexability, structured data, Core Web Vitals. The foundation no content can compensate for if it's broken.

items.title: Content SEO
items.desc: Keyword research, editorial briefs, copywriting, optimisation of existing pages. Content that ranks and converts.

items.title: International SEO
items.desc: Hreflang, multi-market structure, SEO translation. To grow visibility across countries without duplicating or cannibalising.

items.title: SEO audit
items.desc: Technical, content, backlink and competitive diagnosis. Prioritised action plan, delivered in writing, valid even without us.

items.title: Targeted link building
items.desc: On request. No PBNs, no mass, just relevant editorial links that build your authority gradually.

case.label: Representative case
case.h2: A kitchen designer in local SEO.
before: Competitors on page 1 for every query
after: Top 3 Google Maps on 8 local queries
case.footnote: Representative case based on ongoing installations. Exact figures are validated during the free audit.

method.label: How it works
steps: Audit
Technical, content, backlinks, current rankings. Benchmark against direct competitors. Prioritised plan.
Roadmap
6 to 12-month action plan. Quick wins (weeks 1-4) split from long-term work. You approve before we execute.
Monthly execution
Cadenced delivery, 30-day reporting, adjustments based on what the data says. No black box, no fuzzy reports.

faq.label: FAQ
items: Technical quick wins: 2 to 4 weeks. Local SEO: 2 to 4 months. Content SEO on competitive queries: 6 to 12 months. We tell you at the audit.
No, it accelerates it. We use AI for briefs, drafting, faster audits — but rankings still depend on useful content + technical health + authority.
Yes, but targeted. No PBNs, no mass shady links. Only editorial links on relevant sites, negotiated one by one.
Both. But for a local SMB (professional firm, distributor), starting local is almost always the best ROI.

cta.subtitle: We look at your current rankings, your competitors, your site. You walk away with 3 clear priorities, whether you work with us or not.
cta.reassurance: 30 minutes · Free · No commitment · Written diagnosis
